full_text:
Xun Yu (Shuqian) 荀俁 (叔倩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Yu (荀俁), styledShuqian (叔倩), was born in Yingyin county, Yingchuan commandery. Second son of Xun Yu, debated human expression with Xun Can. Xun Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
